# 🪨 CONTENT SCRIPT – Amazonite VP1017 (Single Mode)

> **Date:** 05/04/2026
> **Stone:** Amazonite VP1017 – ArtsCut Zero / Luxury Plus
> **VP Code:** VP1017 | **AC Code (manufacturer):** AC1017
> **Slab Image:** [VP1017 Slab](https://res.cloudinary.com/drcw8n9gh/image/upload/v1775311559/vpstonemason/catalog/acstone/ac1017-0-0-1-2-500x653-662af4b02f7c.jpg)
> **Product Page:** [pvstone.com.au](https://pvstone.com.au/catalog/artscut-zero/luxury-plus/amazonite-or-vp1017)

---

## 🔍 WEB RESEARCH RESULTS

**Source:** AC Stone Group (acstone.com.au) – manufacturer code AC1017

| Property | Detail |
|----------|--------|
| **Base colour** | Seafoam green + cool steely tones |
| **Veining** | Mahogany (reddish-brown) + golden butterscotch flecks |
| **Special property** | Translucent – glows when backlit |
| **Finish** | Matt (from manufacturer), Polished available |
| **Dimensions** | 1620 × 3220 × 20mm |
| **CSF Compliant** | ✅ Crystalline Silica Free |
| **Availability** | NSW, VIC, QLD & TAS |

**Real-world observation:** In showroom/slab form, the seafoam green is vibrant and bold. When installed as benchtop under natural kitchen lighting, the green becomes **softer and more muted**, while the golden butterscotch flecks gain warmth. Best paired with white or light timber cabinetry to let the stone be the focal point.

```
STONE_NAME = Amazonite VP1017
STONE_DESCRIPTION = Amazonite VP1017 is a premium CSF-compliant engineered stone from ArtsCut Zero Luxury Plus range, featuring a harmonious blend of seafoam green and cool steely tones, accented with captivating flecks of mahogany and golden butterscotch. The surface has translucent quality that creates a radiant glow under natural light, 20mm thickness, ideal for modern Melbourne kitchen and bathroom benchtops.
```

## 🖼️ IMAGE GENERATION (6 images)

### All images use Google Flow: https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow

```
📖 QUICK STEPS (repeat for each image):
1. Open https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow → log in
2. Click "Add Reference" → upload slab image
3. Select aspect ratio (3:4 or 1:1 as noted per image)
4. Paste the prompt below
5. Click "Generate" → wait 10-30s
6. Download the result (or click "Refine" to adjust)
```

---

### 🖼️ IMAGE 1: Hero Kitchen Island (3:4)

**Aspect ratio in Flow: select `3:4`**
**Individual caption:** `Amazonite VP1017 — Bringing elegance to this Melbourne kitchen. Polished finish, natural beauty. 💎 #StoneBenchtops #Melbourne`

**👉 PROMPT (copy & paste into Flow):**

```text
Create ONE SINGLE photorealistic kitchen photo (not a collage, not split-screen, not side-by-side).

Use the uploaded stone sample as the exact benchtop material.
The stone is Amazonite VP1017: a premium engineered stone featuring a harmonious blend of seafoam green and cool steely tones, accented with captivating flecks of mahogany and golden butterscotch, with translucent quality that glows under natural light.
Keep the colour, veining and finish identical to the reference stone.

Show a modern Australian kitchen in a Melbourne home, with this stone installed on a large kitchen island and main benchtop.
Clean white and light-wood cabinetry, integrated gas cooktop, modern matte black tapware, undermount sink, realistic pencil round edge profile, 20mm thickness visible.
Natural daylight from a large window, lifestyle items on the bench: ceramic coffee cup, small herb plant, wooden cookbook stand, linen tea towel.

Ultra-realistic interior photography, natural light, subtle imperfections, warm ambient lighting, real project photo by a professional stonemason company.
3:4 vertical composition, one single scene only.
No AI artifacts, no plastic look, no CGI render feel.
```

## 🎬 VIDEO GENERATION (2 videos)

### 🎥 VIDEO 1: Kitchen Pan – Meta AI + Auto Meta

```
📖 STEPS:
1. Open Auto Meta (already set up from images)
2. Click "+ Add Prompt" → select Type: VIDEO ⚠️
3. Paste prompt below
4. Click "Start" → wait 30-60s → auto-downloads
```

**Individual caption:** `Walk through this stunning Amazonite VP1017 kitchen installation. 🎥 #KitchenDesign #StoneKitchen`

**👉 VIDEO PROMPT:**
```text
A slow cinematic camera pan across a modern Melbourne kitchen with Amazonite VP1017 stone benchtops — seafoam green with golden butterscotch and mahogany flecks. Camera moves smoothly left to right along the island benchtop, showing the stone surface texture and veining in natural daylight. Subtle depth of field, warm morning light from window, a coffee cup and plant on the bench. Photorealistic, stable camera, no shake. 5 seconds.
```

### 🎥 VIDEO 2: Push-in Close-up – Google Flow Animate

```
📖 STEPS:
1. Open https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow
2. Select Image 1 (hero kitchen) or upload it
3. Click "Animate" / "Create Video"
4. Upload image as Starting Frame
5. Duration: 5 seconds
6. Paste prompt below
7. Click "Generate Video" → wait 1-2 min → Download
```

**Individual caption:** `Feel the texture — Amazonite VP1017 in natural light. 🌿 #StoneTexture #InteriorDesign`

**👉 VIDEO PROMPT:**
```text
Smooth 5-second camera push-in towards the Amazonite stone kitchen island, slowly revealing the seafoam green surface with golden butterscotch flecks and mahogany accents. Soft natural daylight, shallow depth of field shifting from background to stone surface. Coffee cup gently steaming in foreground. Cinematic, stable camera, no sudden movements.
```

```text
✨ Amazonite VP1017 – Where Nature Meets Modern Luxury ✨

Discover the unique beauty of Amazonite VP1017 from our ArtsCut Zero Luxury Plus collection — a premium engineered stone with a captivating blend of seafoam green and cool steely tones, accented by natural mahogany and golden butterscotch flecks. Its translucent quality creates a radiant glow under natural light — truly a work of art for your home.

💎 Key Features:
✅ Unique seafoam green with golden butterscotch veining
✅ Translucent quality — stunning under natural light
✅ Polished finish, scratch-resistant, easy to maintain
✅ CSF Compliant — Crystalline Silica Free, safe for your family

🏡 Perfect for: Kitchen Islands, Bathroom Vanities, Shower Walls, Feature Walls

💡 Pro tip: This stone pairs beautifully with white or light timber cabinetry, creating a striking focal point in any room!
```
